incorrects.description: Student set Runner C bar to wrong height on first attempt

steps.text: Check the data table. How many laps did Runner C complete?

incorrects.description: Student set Runner C bar to wrong height on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Runner C completed 35 laps. Find 35 on the axis, between 30 and 40.

incorrects.description: Student set Runner C bar to wrong height three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets Runner C bar to 35, between gridlines at 30 and 40

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. Runner C completed 35 laps. I look at the axis and find where 35 would be. It's between 30 and 40, right in the middle. I set the bar to that height.
